title: It's not too late to start buying the data center winners. Here's why
summary: Jim Cramer argues investors shouldn't dismiss opportunities in AI-related data center stocks despite recent market gains. This perspective challenges the common sentiment that entry points for AI winners have already passed, suggesting continued growth potential in the sector.
content: In his Sunday column for Investing Club subscribers, Jim Cramer pushes back on the idea that it's too late to start buying AI winners.

zh.title: 现在开始购买数据中心赢家还不晚。原因如下
zh.summary: 吉姆·克莱默辩称，投资者不应该忽视与AI相关的数据中心股票的机会，尽管最近市场有所上涨。这一观点挑战了人们的普遍看法，即AI赢家的切入点已经错过，暗示该行业具有持续增长的潜力。

title: ‘Fibermaxxing’ has spurred the launch of fiber sodas and gummies. Is the craze going too far?
summary: The "fibermaxxing" trend is driving companies to launch fiber-fortified snacks like sodas and gummies. Health experts caution that the wellness benefits of these products may be overstated despite their growing popularity in the functional food market.
content: Companies are rushing to cash in on “functional snacking,” but experts warn that the health benefits of fiber treats might not be all they’re cracked up to be.

zh.title: "纤维最大化"推动了纤维汽水和软糖的推出。这种疯狂是否过头了？
zh.summary: "纤维最大化"趋势推动公司推出纤维强化零食，如汽水和软糖。卫生健康专家警告称，尽管这些产品在功能食品市场中越来越受欢迎，但其健康益处可能被夸大了。

title: With Netflix new ad-free standard plan at $20, streaming's tipping point into old TV is getting closer
summary: Netflix's $20 ad-free standard plan pricing reflects a shift in streaming economics, where cheaper ad-supported tiers generate comparable or higher revenue for platforms. The industry is approaching a tipping point where streaming services increasingly resemble traditional television's business model.
content: The economics of streaming are nearing the point where cheaper plans with ads make as much if not more money for services like Netflix.

zh.title: 随着Netflix新的20美元无广告标准计划，流媒体向传统电视的转变临界点越来越近
zh.summary: Netflix的20美元无广告标准计划定价反映了流媒体经济学的转变，其中更便宜的广告支持版本为平台产生可比或更高的收入。该行业正在接近一个临界点，流媒体服务越来越像传统电视的商业模式。

title: Big Tech’s AI spending is depriving investors of juicy payouts
summary: Goldman Sachs projects S&P 500 share buybacks will grow only 3% this year as companies prioritize AI investments and navigate economic headwinds. The shift in capital allocation away from shareholder returns highlights the competing pressures tech companies face between innovation spending and investor returns.
content: Goldman Sachs expects S&P 500 share buybacks to grow only 3% this year, as a shaky economic backdrop and AI cost pressures force spending reconsiderations.

zh.title: 科技巨头的AI支出正在削减投资者的丰厚回报
zh.summary: 高盛预计标普500指数的股票回购今年仅增长3%，因为公司优先考虑AI投资并应对经济逆风。资本配置从股东回报转向创新支出的转变突显了科技公司所面临的竞争压力。

title: At 103 years old, I’m the ‘world’s oldest doctor’: My 3 rules for a long, happy life are so simple—I tell it to 'all my patients'
summary: Dr. Howard Tucker, recognized as the world's oldest doctor at 103, shared three simple rules for longevity and well-being before his recent passing. His wisdom gained from a century of life and medical practice offers straightforward guidance on achieving a long and healthy life.
content: Dr. Howard Tucker left behind an impressive legacy. At 103, he was named the oldest doctor in the world — and quite possibly the happiest. Shortly before passing away, he shared his rules for living a long, happy and healthy life. They're very simple, he says.

zh.title: 我今年103岁，是"世界最年长医生"：我长寿幸福的3条法则很简单——我都告诉我的患者
zh.summary: 被认定为世界最年长医生的霍华德·塔克博士在去世前分享了三条简单的长寿和幸福法则。他从一个世纪的生活和医学实践中获得的智慧为实现长寿健康的生活提供了直白的指导。

title: Meet the YouTube whisperers, a booming class of advisors behind MrBeast and other million-dollar channels
summary: A growing profession of YouTube strategists are commanding substantial fees to help creators expand their channels, working behind major successful channels like MrBeast. This emerging advisory class capitalizes on the competitive creator economy where strategic guidance can significantly impact growth and revenue.
content: A burgeoning group of YouTube strategists are charging big money to YouTubers who want to expand their popularity.

zh.title: 认识YouTube"耳语者"：MrBeast等百万级频道背后蓬勃发展的顾问行业
zh.summary: 一个不断增长的YouTube策略专家行业正在收取巨额费用，帮助创作者扩展频道，在MrBeast等重大成功频道背后工作。这个新兴的顾问行业利用了竞争激烈的创作者经济，其中战略指导可以显著影响增长和收入。

title: Stocks are walking a tightrope to fresh record highs — as a handful of names do most of the heavy lifting
summary: A narrow group of technology stocks is driving the broader market to record highs, creating precarious dynamics as investors watch for signs of weakness elsewhere. The market's reliance on a limited set of mega-cap stocks raises questions about breadth and sustainability of the rally.
content: Investors are caught on a tightrope — watching a very narrow band of tech stocks lift the stock market to fresh record highs, while looking down below for signs of trouble.

zh.title: 股票在走钢丝走向新高——少数几家公司承担了大部分负担
zh.summary: 一小部分科技股票推动更广泛的市场创造新高，当投资者观察其他地方的疲软迹象时，形成了危险的动态。市场对有限数量的大型科技股的依赖提出了关于涨势的广度和可持续性的问题。

title: This Philly man has spent over $18,000 buying almost 100 Sixers-Knicks tickets for out-of-town basketball fans
summary: A Philadelphia resident has invested over $18,000 to purchase approximately 100 Sixers-Knicks playoff tickets for out-of-town fans, circumventing local ZIP code purchase restrictions. The fan's gesture demonstrates community spirit while highlighting accessibility challenges in acquiring tickets for high-demand sporting events.
content: Fans need a Philadelphia ZIP Code to buy tickets to the Sixers-Knicks playoff series in Philly this weekend. One man told MarketWatch he’s helping out-of-towners because “it’s part of being a fan.”

zh.title: 这名费城男子花费超过18,000美元购买近100张76人队-尼克斯队门票供外地篮球迷使用
zh.summary: 一位费城居民投资了超过18,000美元购买约100张76人队-尼克斯队季后赛门票供外地球迷使用，规避了当地邮编购票限制。这位球迷的举动展示了社区精神，同时突出了获得高需求体育赛事门票的可及性挑战。

title: EBay permanently bans GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen for putting its community ‘at risk’ following takeover attempt
summary: eBay has permanently banned GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen after his failed $55.5 billion takeover proposal, citing concerns about his use of the platform to sell GameStop merchandise. The ban underscores tensions between aggressive acquisition attempts and platform governance.
content: The GameStop chief, who proposed acquiring eBay for $55.5 billion Monday, was selling GameStop-related merchandise through his account.

zh.title: eBay因收购尝试后将其社区"置于风险中"而永久禁止GameStop CEO瑞恩·科恩
zh.summary: eBay在GameStop CEO瑞恩·科恩的550亿美元收购提议失败后，以他利用该平台销售GameStop商品为由，对其进行了永久禁止。该禁令反映了激进收购尝试与平台治理之间的紧张关系。

title: SEC delay on prediction markets ETFs echoes a long-fought bitcoin fund battle
summary: The SEC's delayed approval of prediction markets ETFs mirrors the years-long regulatory battle over bitcoin exchange-traded funds. The pattern reflects regulators' cautious approach to approving novel financial products that challenge traditional market infrastructure and oversight frameworks.
content: The Securities and Exchange Commission has delayed approval for prediction markets ETFs, bringing up memories of the long battle over bitcoin funds.

zh.title: SEC对预测市场ETF的延迟反映出长期的比特币基金之战
zh.summary: SEC对预测市场ETF批准的延迟反映了多年来关于比特币交易所交易基金的监管斗争。这种模式反映了监管机构对批准挑战传统市场基础设施和监督框架的新型金融产品的谨慎态度。

title: Target is trying to win back busy families from Walmart, starting with the baby aisle
summary: Target is overhauling its baby product category to compete more effectively with Walmart and Amazon, focusing on improved selection and convenience for busy families. The refresh is part of Target's broader effort to regain market share in this key demographic.
content: Target is refreshing its baby category as part of a broader effort to offer better products and more convenience to compete with Walmart and Amazon.

zh.title: Target试图从沃尔玛赢回繁忙的家庭，从婴儿产品走道开始
zh.summary: Target正在改革其婴儿产品类别，以更有效地与沃尔玛和亚马逊竞争，重点关注改进的选择和对繁忙家庭的便利性。此次改革是Target更广泛努力的一部分，以在这一关键人口群体中重新获得市场份额。

title: Alphabet's 160% rally in a year reflects value of owning 'most of the stack' in AI
summary: Alphabet's stock has rallied 160% over the past year as investors recognize Google's comprehensive AI capabilities across its business stack, reversing earlier perceptions of the company as an AI laggard. The surge reflects confidence in Google's long-term AI competitiveness.
content: Google was seen as an AI laggard in the early days of the AI boom, but investors are now betting that the search giant will be a clear winner.

zh.title: Alphabet一年内上涨160%反映了在AI中拥有"大部分堆栈"的价值
zh.summary: Alphabet的股票在过去一年上涨了160%，因为投资者认可谷歌在其业务堆栈中全面的AI能力，扭转了之前认为该公司是AI落后者的看法。此次上升反映了对谷歌长期AI竞争力的信心。

title: Retailers are on a hiring spree. But consumers are sending warning signs
summary: Retail trade added nearly 22,000 jobs in April, representing one-fifth of total employment growth and suggesting strong hiring momentum in the sector. However, broader consumer warning signs suggest retailers may be preparing for demand shifts, creating tension between hiring confidence and economic uncertainty.
content: The retail trades added nearly 22,000 jobs  in April, accounting for about one-fifth of total job growth.

zh.title: 零售商在大规模招聘，但消费者发出警告信号
zh.summary: 零售贸易在4月增加了近22,000个工作岗位，代表总就业增长的五分之一，表明该部门存在强劲的招聘势头。然而，更广泛的消费者警告信号表明零售商可能在为需求变化做准备，这在招聘信心与经济不确定性之间造成了紧张局势。

title: Top Wall Street analysts recommend these 3 dividend stocks for stable income
summary: Top Wall Street analysts are recommending three dividend stocks as a strategy for investors to generate stable income while reducing portfolio downside risk through consistent payouts. Dividend stocks are seen as a cushion against market volatility.
content: Dividend-paying stocks can help cushion downside risk while offering consistent returns.

zh.title: 顶级华尔街分析师推荐这3只股息股票获得稳定收入
zh.summary: 顶级华尔街分析师推荐三只股息股票作为投资者生成稳定收入的策略，同时通过持续股息支付降低投资组合的下行风险。股息股票被视为对抗市场波动的缓冲。

title: Memory chip makers are looking at a 'supercycle' and 'windfall gains.' The stocks jumped 30% in one week
summary: Memory chip manufacturers are experiencing a potential supercycle as elevated chip prices drive strong margin projections through 2027, causing semiconductor stocks to jump 30% in a single week. The rally reflects industry optimism about sustained pricing power.
content: Higher prices on chips are boosting margin projections through 2027.

zh.title: 内存芯片制造商看到"超级周期"和"意外收益"。股价一周内上涨30%
zh.summary: 内存芯片制造商正经历潜在的超级周期，因为芯片价格上升推动了截至2027年的强劲利润率预期，导致半导体股票一周内上涨30%。这次上涨反映了业界对持续定价能力的乐观态度。

title: Tanker crosses Strait of Hormuz as U.S. waits for Iran's response to peace proposal
summary: A QatarEnergy-operated tanker successfully transited the Strait of Hormuz while the U.S. awaits Iran's response to a peace proposal, highlighting ongoing geopolitical risks in this critical energy shipping corridor. The passage underscores fragile stability in the region.
content: The QatarEnergy-operated carrier Al Kharaitiyat passed safely through the strait and was heading for Pakistan, according to shipping analytics firm Kpler.

zh.title: 当美国等待伊朗对和平提案的回应时，油轮穿过霍尔木兹海峡
zh.summary: 卡塔尔能源运营的油轮成功通过霍尔木兹海峡，此时美国等待伊朗对和平提案的回应，突显了这条关键能源运输走廊中持续的地缘政治风险。这一通过强调了该地区脆弱的稳定性。

title: Spanish passengers start disembarkation from ship hit by hantavirus
summary: Spanish passengers are disembarking from a cruise ship after a hantavirus outbreak that killed three people and sickened eight total, marking a rare instance of person-to-person transmission. Hantavirus is typically spread through rodent contact.
content: Eight people on board fell ill, including three who died. Hantavirus is usually spread by rodents but can in rare cases be transmitted person-to-person.

zh.title: 西班牙乘客开始从受汉坦病毒影响的船只撤离
zh.summary: 西班牙乘客正在从一艘因汉坦病毒爆发而受到影响的游轮撤离，该病毒已造成3人死亡、8人患病，标志着罕见的人与人之间的传播。汉坦病毒通常通过啮齿动物接触传播。

title: Saudi Aramco Q1 profit jumps 26% as key pipeline reaches capacity amid Iran war
summary: Saudi Aramco's first-quarter profits surged 26% as its East-West pipeline reached full capacity, helping the company offset energy disruptions caused by regional conflict with Iran. The pipeline achievement demonstrates Aramco's operational resilience amid geopolitical pressures.
content: Aramco says its East-West pipeline has helped to mitigate the energy shock caused by the Iran war.

zh.title: 沙特阿美第一季度利润增长26% 关键管道在伊朗战争中达到满负荷
zh.summary: 沙特阿美第一季度利润激增26%，其东西向管道达到满负荷，帮助公司抵消由伊朗地区冲突造成的能源中断。这一管道成就证明了阿美在地缘政治压力下的运营韧性。

title: Campaigners call for ban on use of weedkiller glyphosate at harvest time
summary: Campaigners are pushing for restrictions on glyphosate use during harvest season due to health and safety concerns. The proposed ban targets a weedkiller widely used in agriculture, raising questions about pesticide regulation and chemical farming inputs. This reflects ongoing debates about balancing agricultural efficiency with public health protection.
content: Campaigners are calling for a ban on the use of the weedkiller over health concerns.

zh.title: 活动人士呼吁禁止在收获时使用除草剂草甘膦
zh.summary: 活动人士推动在收获季节期间限制草甘膦的使用，原因是健康和安全方面的担忧。该提议的禁令针对在农业中广泛使用的除草剂，引发了关于农药监管和化学农业投入的问题。这反映了关于在农业效率与公共健康保护之间取得平衡的持续辩论。
